description: report 时平台 5xx(短暂故障)→ BYO SDK 必须指数退避(200ms / 400ms / 800ms,默认 retryMaxAttempts=3)。三次全失败后 log + drop,下次 lease renew 时 orch 兜底回收

then.sdkExpectedAction: attempt 1 → fail → sleep 200ms; attempt 2 → fail → sleep 400ms; attempt 3 → fail → log ERROR + drop; do not block worker thread on subsequent tasks; lease renew loop will detect (orch回收) and clean up locally
sdkMustNot: block heartbeat scheduler during retry sleep
